rea-agents
    Preparing search index...
    • application/BinarySession
    • BinarySession

    Class BinarySession

    Owns the single active target shared by CLI and MCP adapters.

    Target transitions are serialized because switching targets tears down the active provider client. A failed switch recreates the previous target instead of retaining a client whose resources were already shut down.

    Hierarchy (View Summary)

    • BinarySessionRecords
      • BinarySession

    Implements

    • BinarySessionPort
    • Defined in src/application/BinarySession.ts:52

    evidenceById

    • evidenceById(
          evidenceId: string,
      ):
          | {
              analysis_profile: {
                  digest: string;
                  parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                  provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                  provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                  schema_version: 1;
              };
              authority: | "shipped-artifact"
              | "controlled-replay"
              | "historical-reference"
              | "external-service"
              | "analyst-inference";
              confidence: "observed"
              | "derived"
              | "inferred";
              environment:
                  | {
                      architecture: string;
                      id: string;
                      isolation: "process"
                      | "none"
                      | "container"
                      | "virtual-machine";
                      platform: string;
                  }
                  | null;
              evidence_id: string;
              evidence_links: string[];
              limitations: string[];
              locations: (
                  | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                  | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                  | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                  | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                  | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }

              schema_version: 2;
              subject:
                  | {
                      architecture: "x86"
                      | "x86_64"
                      | "arm"
                      | "arm64"
                      | null;
                      digest: { sha256: string };
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"

                          | "analysis-database"

                          | "apk";

                      name: string;
                  }

    execute

    • execute(
          name: AnalysisOperation,
          arguments_: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>,
          options?: { signal?: AbortSignal },
      ): Promise<Result<AnalysisExecution, AnalysisError>>

      Invoke a provider operation against the active target. Calls may overlap, but a pending target transition prevents new calls from entering until the transition has settled.

      Parameters

      • name: AnalysisOperation
      • arguments_: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>
      • Optionaloptions: { signal?: AbortSignal }

      Returns Promise<Result<AnalysisExecution, AnalysisError>>

      Implementation of BinarySessionPort.execute

      • Defined in src/application/BinarySession.ts:270

              contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
              domain: string;
              mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
              previous_revision_digest: string
              | null;
              question: string;
              recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
              registry_version: 1;
              relationships: {
                  type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                  unknown_id: string;
              }[];
              required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
              | "controlled-replay"
              | "historical-reference"
              | "external-service"
              | "analyst-inference"
              | null;
              required_confidence: "observed"
              | "derived"
              | "inferred";
              required_environment:
                  | {
                      architecture: string
                      | null;
                      id: string | null;
                      isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                      platform: string | null;
                  }
                  | null;
              resolution: | {
                  disposition: "verified";
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  rationale: string;
              }
              | {
                  disposition: "withdrawn"
                  | "out-of-scope";
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  rationale: string;
              }
              | null;
              revision: number;
              revision_digest: string;
              scope_digest: string
              | null;
              severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
              status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
              supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
              unknown_id: string;
          }[];
      }

                      provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                      raw_result: JSONType;
                      schema_version: 2;
                      subject:
                          | {
                              architecture: "x86"
                              | "x86_64"
                              | "arm"
                              | "arm64"
                              | null;
                              digest: { sha256: string };
                              format:
                                  | "unknown"
                                  | "file"
                                  | "directory"
                                  | "javascript"
                                  | "source-map"

                                  | "entitlements"

                                  | "hopper"

                                  | "ipa"
                                  | "apk";

                              name: string;
                          }
                          | null;
                  }

                      authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                      | "controlled-replay"
                      | "historical-reference"
                      | "external-service"

                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred";

                          | {

                          | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                          | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                          | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                          | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }

                  previous_revision_digest: string
                  | null;

                  registry_version: 1;
                  relationships: {
                      type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];

                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "historical-reference"
                  | "external-service"
                  | "analyst-inference"
                  | null;

                  | "inferred";

                      | {

                          isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                          platform: string | null;
                      }
                      | null;

                      disposition: "verified";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | {
                      disposition: "withdrawn"
                      | "out-of-scope";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | null;

                  status:
                      | "open"
                      | "investigating"
                      | "blocked"
                      | "contradicted"
                      | "resolved";

                  unknown_id: string;
              }[];

          previous_revision_digest: string
          | null;

          revision_digest: string;
          runs: (
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];

                  | "record-and-continue";

                      format:

                          | "entitlements"

          bundle: {

                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  run_id: string;
                  schema_version: 1;
                  status: "complete"
                  | "running";
              }
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];
                  integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                  integrity_policy: "fail"
                  | "record-and-continue";
                  left: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  legacy_request_identity: true;
                  limitations: string[];
                  max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                  options: {
                      change_limit: number;
                      max_compression_ratio: number;
                      max_depth: number;
                      max_entries: number;
                      max_entry_bytes: number;
                      max_path_bytes: number;
                      max_total_bytes: number;
                      page_size: number;
                  };
                  request_sha256: string;
                  result_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  right: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  run_id: string;
                  schema_version: 1;
                  status: "complete"
                  | "running";
              }
          )[];
          workspace_id: string;
          workspace_version: 1;
      }[]

    listUnknowns

    • listUnknowns(
          filters?: {
              domain?: string;
              severity?: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
              status?:
                  | "open"
                  | "investigating"
                  | "blocked"
                  | "contradicted"
                  | "resolved";
          },
      ): {
          contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
          domain: string;
          mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
          previous_revision_digest: string
          | null;
          question: string;
          recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
          registry_version: 1;
          relationships: {
              type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
              unknown_id: string;
          }[];
          required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
          | "controlled-replay"
          | "historical-reference"
          | "external-service"
          | "analyst-inference"
          | null;
          required_confidence: "observed"
          | "derived"
          | "inferred";
          required_environment:
              | {
                  architecture: string
                  | null;
                  id: string | null;
                  isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                  platform: string | null;
              }
              | null;
          resolution: | {
              disposition: "verified";
              evidence_ids: string[];
              rationale: string;
          }
          | {
              disposition: "withdrawn"
              | "out-of-scope";
              evidence_ids: string[];
              rationale: string;
          }
          | null;
          revision: number;
          revision_digest: string;
          scope_digest: string
          | null;
          severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
          status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
          supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
          unknown_id: string;
      }[]

    open

    • open(
          path: string,
          options?: BinarySessionOpenOptions,
      ): Promise<Result<BinaryTarget, AnalysisError>>

    reconstructionCoverageWorkspace

    • reconstructionCoverageWorkspace(
          workspaceId: string,
          revision: number,
      ):
          | {
              artifacts: {
                  artifact_id: string;
                  artifact_sha256: string;
                  environment_sha256: string;
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  version: string;
              }[];
              boundaries: {
                  allowed_dispositions: ("external" | "non-goal")[];
                  allowed_unknown_ids: string[];
                  boundary_id: string;
                  required_claim_ids: string[];
                  required_package_proof_kinds: (
                      | "build"
                      | "clean-install"
                      | "package-contents"
                      | "runtime-routing"
                      | "authority-independence"
                  )[];
                  required_surface_ids: string[];
                  title: string;
              }[];
              claims: {
                  claim_id: string;
                  kind: string;
                  required_authority: | "external"
                  | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "live-observation";
                  required_dimensions: string[];
                  surface_ids: string[];
                  title: string;
              }[];
              contradictions: {
                  claim_ids: string[];
                  contradiction_id: string;
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  status: "resolved"
                  | "active";
                  surface_ids: string[];
              }[];
              evidence_bundle: {
                  artifacts: {
                      architecture: "x86"
                      | "x86_64"
                      | "arm"
                      | "arm64"
                      | null;
                      digest: { sha256: string };
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                  }[];
                  bundle_version: 2;
                  captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                  environments: {
                      architecture: string;
                      id: string;
                      isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
                      platform: string;
                  }[];
                  providers: { id: string; name: string; version: string
                  | null }[];
                  records: (
                      | {
                          analysis_profile: {
                              digest: string;
                              parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                              provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                              provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                              schema_version: 1;
                          };
                          authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                          | "controlled-replay"
                          | "historical-reference"
                          | "external-service"
                          | "analyst-inference";
                          confidence: "observed"
                          | "derived"
                          | "inferred";
                          environment:
                              | {
                                  architecture: string;
                                  id: string;
                                  isolation: "process"
                                  | "none"
                                  | "container"
                                  | "virtual-machine";
                                  platform: string;
                              }
                              | null;
                          evidence_id: string;
                          evidence_links: string[];
                          limitations: string[];
                          locations: (
                              | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                              | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                              | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                              | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                              | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                          )[];
                          normalized_result: JSONType;
                          operation: string;
                          parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                          predicate_type: string;
                          provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                          raw_result: JSONType;
                          schema_version: 2;
                          subject:
                              | {
                                  architecture: "x86"
                                  | "x86_64"
                                  | "arm"
                                  | "arm64"
                                  | null;
                                  digest: { sha256: string };
                                  format:
                                      | "unknown"
                                      | "file"
                                      | "directory"
                                      | "javascript"
                                      | "source-map"
                                      | "plist"
                                      | "entitlements"
                                      | "dmg"
                                      | "zip"
                                      | "pkg"

                                      | "pe"
                                      | "hopper"
                                      | "analysis-database"
                                      | "ipa"
                                      | "apk";
                                  local_path: string;
                                  name: string;
                              }
                              | null;
                      }
                      | {
                          authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                          | "controlled-replay"
                          | "historical-reference"
                          | "external-service"
                          | "analyst-inference";
                          confidence: "observed"

                              | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                              | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }

                          )[];

                          operation: string;
                          parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                          predicate_type: string;
                          provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                          raw_result: JSONType;
                          schema_version: 2;
                          subject:
                              | {
                                  architecture: "x86"
                                  | "x86_64"
                                  | "arm"
                                  | "arm64"
                                  | null;
                                  digest: { sha256: string };
                                  format:
                                      | "unknown"
                                      | "file"
                                      | "directory"
                                      | "javascript"
                                      | "source-map"
                                      | "plist"
                                      | "entitlements"
                                      | "dmg"
                                      | "zip"
                                      | "pkg"
                                      | "asar"
                                      | "javascript-bundle"
                                      | "mach-o-universal"
                                      | "mach-o"
                                      | "elf"
                                      | "pe"
                                      | "hopper"
                                      | "analysis-database"
                                      | "ipa"
                                      | "apk";
                                  local_path: string;
                                  name: string;
                              }
                              | null;
                      }
                  )[];
                  scenarios: {
                      authority: "controlled-replay";
                      evidence_id: string;
                      operation: string;
                  }[];
                  unknowns: {
                      contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      domain: string;
                      mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                      previous_revision_digest: string
                      | null;
                      question: string;
                      recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                      registry_version: 1;
                      relationships: {
                          type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                          unknown_id: string;
                      }[];
                      required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                      | "controlled-replay"
                      | "historical-reference"
                      | "external-service"
                      | "analyst-inference"
                      | null;
                      required_confidence: "observed"
                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred";
                      required_environment:
                          | {
                              architecture: string
                              | null;
                              id: string | null;
                              isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                              platform: string | null;
                          }
                          | null;
                      resolution: | {
                          disposition: "verified";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | {
                          disposition: "withdrawn"
                          | "out-of-scope";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | null;
                      revision: number;
                      revision_digest: string;
                      scope_digest: string
                      | null;
                      severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                      status:
                          | "open"
                          | "investigating"
                          | "blocked"
                          | "contradicted"
                          | "resolved";
                      supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
              };
              name: string;
              owners: {
                  ownership: | {
                      authority_route: "unknown"
                      | "none"
                      | "detected";
                      disposition: "implemented";
                      owner_export: string | null;
                      owner_path: string;
                      owner_sha256: string;
                      package_state: "unknown" | "missing" | "distributed";
                      path_state: "unknown" | "missing" | "present";
                  }
                  | { disposition: "external"
                  | "non-goal"; rationale: string };
                  surface_id: string;
              }[];
              package_proofs: {
                  artifact_sha256s: string[];
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  kind: | "build"
                  | "clean-install"
                  | "package-contents"
                  | "runtime-routing"
                  | "authority-independence";
                  proof_id: string;
                  status: "unknown"
                  | "fail"
                  | "pass"
                  | "unsupported"
                  | "skipped";
              }[];
              previous_revision_sha256: string
              | null;
              residual_unknown_ids: string[];
              revision: number;
              revision_sha256: string;
              schema_version: 1;
              surfaces: {
                  artifact_id: string;
                  authority:
                      | "external"
                      | "observed"
                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred"
                      | "historical";
                  dependency_surface_ids: string[];
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  family: string;
                  location: string;
                  occurrence_id: string
                  | null;
                  surface_id: string;
              }[];
              verifier_contracts: {
                  authority: | "external"
                  | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "live-observation";
                  claim_ids: string[];
                  contract_sha256: string;
                  dimensions: string[];
                  max_age_ms: number;
                  minimum_repeats: number;
                  normalization_removes_dimensions: false;
                  normalization_sha256: string;
                  verifier_id: string;
              }[];
              verifier_results: {
                  artifact_sha256s: string[];
                  contract_sha256: string;
                  covered_claim_ids: string[];
                  covered_dimensions: string[];
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  normalization_sha256: string;
                  observed_at: string;
                  owner_sha256s: string[];
                  repeats: number;
                  status: | "unknown"
                  | "truncated"
                  | "fail"
                  | "pass"
                  | "unsupported"
                  | "skipped";
                  verifier_id: string;
              }[];
              workspace_id: string;
          }
          | undefined

                          | "resolved";

                  | "fail"
                  | "pass"
                  | "unsupported"
                  | "skipped";
              }[];

              | null;

                      | "external"

                          }
                          | null;

              )[];

                  | null;

                      | "open"
                      | "investigating"
                      | "blocked"
                      | "contradicted"
                      | "resolved";
                  supporting_evidence_ids: string[];

              }[];

              | "skipped";

                              | "javascript"
                              | "source-map"

                              | "dmg"
                              | "zip"
                              | "pkg"

                              | "pe"
                              | "hopper"
                              | "analysis-database"
                              | "ipa"
                              | "apk";
                          local_path: string;
                          name: string;
                      }
                      | null;
              },
      ): Result<
          "added"
          | "duplicate",
          EvidenceIntegrityError | EvidenceLimitError,
      >

    ProtectedrecordSnapshot

    • recordSnapshot(
          input: {
              execution: AnalysisExecution;
              operation: AnalysisOperation;
              parameters: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>;
              profile: {
                  digest: string;

                      mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                      previous_revision_digest: string
                      | null;
                      question: string;
                      recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                      registry_version: 1;
                      relationships: {
                          type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                          unknown_id: string;
                      }[];
                      required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                      | "controlled-replay"
                      | "historical-reference"
                      | "external-service"
                      | "analyst-inference"
                      | null;
                      required_confidence: "observed"
                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred";
                      required_environment:
                          | {
                              architecture: string
                              | null;
                              id: string | null;
                              isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                              platform: string | null;
                          }
                          | null;
                      resolution: | {
                          disposition: "verified";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | {
                          disposition: "withdrawn"
                          | "out-of-scope";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | null;

                      revision_digest: string;
                      scope_digest: string
                      | null;
                      severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                      status:
                          | "open"
                          | "investigating"
                          | "blocked"
                          | "contradicted"
                          | "resolved";
                      supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
              };
              name: string;
              owners: {
                  ownership: | {
                      authority_route: "unknown"
                      | "none"
                      | "detected";
                      disposition: "implemented";
                      owner_export: string | null;
                      owner_path: string;
                      owner_sha256: string;
                      package_state: "unknown" | "missing" | "distributed";
                      path_state: "unknown" | "missing" | "present";
                  }
                  | { disposition: "external"
                  | "non-goal"; rationale: string };
                  surface_id: string;
              }[];
              package_proofs: {
                  artifact_sha256s: string[];
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  kind: | "build"
                  | "clean-install"
                  | "package-contents"
                  | "runtime-routing"
                  | "authority-independence";
                  proof_id: string;
                  status: "unknown"
                  | "fail"
                  | "pass"
                  | "unsupported"
                  | "skipped";
              }[];
              previous_revision_sha256: string
              | null;
              residual_unknown_ids: string[];
              revision: number;
              revision_sha256: string;
              schema_version: 1;
              surfaces: {
                  artifact_id: string;
                  authority:
                      | "external"
                      | "observed"
                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred"
                      | "historical";
                  dependency_surface_ids: string[];
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  family: string;
                  location: string;
                  occurrence_id: string
                  | null;
                  surface_id: string;
              }[];

                  authority: | "external"
                  | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "live-observation";
                  claim_ids: string[];
                  contract_sha256: string;
                  dimensions: string[];
                  max_age_ms: number;
                  minimum_repeats: number;
                  normalization_removes_dimensions: false;
                  normalization_sha256: string;
                  verifier_id: string;
              }[];
              verifier_results: {

                  | "fail"
                  | "pass"
                  | "unsupported"
                  | "skipped";
                  verifier_id: string;
              }[];
              workspace_id: string;
          },
      ): "added"
      | "duplicate"
